package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"go/scanner"
)
func main() {
    var quan1, quan2, quan3 int
    var prod1, prod2, prod3 float64
    var money float64

    fmt.Scan(&quan1)
    fmt.Scan(&quan2)
    fmt.Scan(&quan3)

    fmt.Scan(&prod1)
    fmt.Scan(&prod2)
    fmt.Scan(&prod3)

}
